summary: Atlassian Convert User Identifiers To Account Ids In Jql Queries

queryStrings: issuetype = Bug AND assignee in (mia) AND reporter in (alana) order by lastViewed DESC

responseExamples.example: {"queriesWithUnknownUsers":[{"convertedQuery":"assignee = unknown","originalQuery":"assignee = mia"}],"queryStrings":["issuetype = Bug AND assignee in (abcde-12345) AND reporter in (abc551-c4e99) order by lastViewed DESC"]}
